image:image.image:title: Srinivasa Manikanta Rajapantula — Embedded Systems and IoT Engineer
image:image.image:caption: Portrait of Srinivasa Manikanta Rajapantula, EEE student specializing in Embedded Systems, IoT, and Smart Energy

image:image.image:title: Firefighter Safety Device — IoT Wearable Project by Srinivasa Manikanta
image:image.image:caption: ESP32-based IoT wearable device for firefighter safety monitoring with real-time dashboard

image:image.image:title: ColorOhm — Resistor Color Code Calculator App
image:image.image:caption: Android app and web tool for precision 4-band and 5-band resistor color code decoding

image:image.image:title: Automatic Exhaust Fan — Gas Detection System
image:image.image:caption: Arduino-based automatic exhaust fan with MQ-2 gas and smoke detection sensor

image:image.image:title: Single Axis Solar Tracker — Relay Logic Circuit
image:image.image:caption: Hardware-only solar panel tracker using LDR sensors and relay logic with ~30% efficiency gain

image:image.image:title: Automatic Streetlight System — Solar Powered IC 555
image:image.image:caption: Solar-powered automatic streetlight using IC 555 timer and LDR sensor for dusk/dawn switching

image:image.image:title: A-Hacks 24hr Hackathon Banner
image:image.image:caption: Banner from the A-Hacks 24-hour hardware hackathon where Srinivasa Manikanta won 2nd prize

image:image.image:title: A-Hacks 2nd Prize Ceremony — Srinivasa Manikanta
image:image.image:caption: Srinivasa Manikanta receiving 2nd prize at A-Hacks hackathon for the Firefighter Safety Device

image:image.image:title: A-Hacks 2nd Place Certificate
image:image.image:caption: 2nd place certificate from A-Hacks hardware hackathon

image:image.image:title: Firefighter Safety Device Demo Presentation
image:image.image:caption: Live demo of the IoT firefighter safety device at A-Hacks hackathon

image:image.image:title: A-Hacks Judge Evaluation
image:image.image:caption: Judges evaluating the firefighter safety device project at A-Hacks

image:image.image:title: Hackathon Coding Session
image:image.image:caption: Coding and building the IoT device firmware during the 24-hour hackathon

image:image.image:title: Firefighter Device — Front View
image:image.image:caption: Front view of the wearable firefighter safety device with sensors mounted on strap

image:image.image:title: Firefighter Device — Back View
image:image.image:caption: Back view showing ESP32 microcontroller and wiring of the firefighter safety device

image:image.image:title: Firefighter Safety Device Infographic Poster
image:image.image:caption: Technical infographic poster explaining the firefighter safety device system architecture

image:image.image:title: Firefighter Safety Device — Real-Time Dashboard
image:image.image:caption: Web dashboard showing real-time firefighter telemetry, GPS location, and alert status

image:image.image:title: Automatic Exhaust Fan System — Build Photo 1
image:image.image:caption: Arduino-based automatic exhaust fan with MQ-2 sensor and relay module

image:image.image:title: Industrial Single Line Diagram — Coromandel Internship
image:image.image:caption: Single line diagram of industrial power distribution from Coromandel International training

image:image.image:caption: Internship completion certificate from Coromandel International Ltd for electrical engineering training
